opportunities.title: [Hiring]VODs Trimmer/Editor ($200/month, Remote, Long Term, Part Time)
opportunities.description:
[Hiring]VODs Trimmer/Editor ($200/month, Remote, Long Term, Part Time)

Looking for someone who can trim down 11 hours of gaming footage weekly(5.5 hours VODs 2 times a week). Your job is to cut out the boring part, and keep as much volume as possible(30min-4.5 hours output video), similar to Caseoh's VODs style gameplay/walkthrough gameplay series, intro+clean cut+occasionally zooming in & out+a same outro for every video, nothing fancy, that's it. You must be able to submit on time consistently and has fast turnaround. I do not read comment here, please DM and show me your previous work
opportunities.llm_fit_note: [REJECT] Role is for video editing, completely unrelated to Tabish's frontend development expertise.

opportunities.title: [Hiring] long term VA
opportunities.description:
[Hiring] long term VA

Looking for a long-term Virtual Assistant. The ideal candidate should be proficient in MS Excel and reside in the united states. This is a remote position with a fair pay. If you are interested, Please send resume here: Louiscorrado204@gmail . com   submitted by   /u/PristineAd3287 [link]   [comments]
opportunities.llm_fit_note: [REJECT] Requires candidate to reside in the United States, which conflicts with candidate's location in Pakistan.
